title: The invisible creeper
description: The invisible creeper 🫥 is now hunting you in silence... If you hear a whisper 🌬️💀, it will be too late!
body:
Our resource pack radically changes the rules of the game, making creepers completely transparent like glass 🫥. Imagine: you are exploring a cave or building your house, and death is already nearby... You won't see it until it's too late. The only warning is a barely perceptible hiss coming from the void and goosebumps 🌬️💀.

 This is not just a texture change - it's a new challenge for even the most experienced survivalists. Are you ready to face the real horror that you can't see? Download and test your nerves! ⚡
